Title: Establishes the tenant power act
Summary: Establishes the tenant power act; authorizes the establishment of tenant unions and sets forth the powers and duties of such organizations; establishes the statewide tenant association; provides for the enforcement of such provisions; establishes the statewide tenant association fund; makes an appropriation therefor.
LawCode: Add Art 7-B §§239-h - 239-m, RP L; add §99-uu, St Fin L
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the real property law, in relation to establishing tenant unions and the statewide tenant association; and to amend the state finance law, in relation to establishing the statewide tenant association fund; and making an appropriation therefor
